vision.command: docker run -d --name catmonitor-vision --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add=video --ipc=host --cap-add=SYS_PTRACE --security-opt seccomp=unconfined -e HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -e ROCM_VERSION=5.7 -p 8000:8000 vllm/vllm-openai:latest --model Qwen/Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct --max-model-len 16384 --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0 --enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser qwen
vision.notes: Requires ROCm 5.7+ and Docker with GPU access. Model will auto-download from HuggingFace on first run.

embedding.command: docker run -d --name catmonitor-embedding --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add=video --ipc=host --cap-add=SYS_PTRACE --security-opt seccomp=unconfined -e HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -e ROCM_VERSION=5.7 -p 8001:8000 vllm/vllm-openai:latest --model Qwen/Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B --max-model-len 8192 --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0
embedding.notes: Requires ROCm 5.7+ and Docker with GPU access. Model will auto-download from HuggingFace on first run.

coding.notes: First run: ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:7b to download model. Ollama must be installed on host system.

prior_specs.api_contract:
API_CONTRACT:
  cfg : dict  — the fully validated contents of sys_config.json, loaded once
                at import time from the directory containing config.py.
                Access any key directly: cfg["models"]["vision"]["endpoint"]
  reload_cfg() -> dict  — re-reads sys_config.json from disk and returns it,
                           useful for tests that patch the file.

API_CONTRACT:
Exports:
- cfg: Dict[str, Any] - Global configuration dictionary with all system settings

API_CONTRACT:
Exports:
- FileWatcher: Class for monitoring upload directory
- main: Function to start the watcher service

API_CONTRACT:
Exports:
- FrameExtractor: Class for extracting and scoring video frames
- extract_frames_from_video: Async function for convenient frame extraction
- parse_timestamp_from_filename: Utility function for timestamp parsing

API_CONTRACT:
Exports:
- VisionTool: Class for vision model interaction
- validate_analysis_schema: Function to validate analysis data structure
- normalize_vocabulary_values: Function to normalize vocabulary terms

API_CONTRACT:
Exports:
- CatIdentityEngine: Main class for cat identification and profile management
- average_embeddings: Utility function for embedding arithmetic  
- cosine_distance: Utility function for embedding similarity
- should_apply_hard_filter: Utility for metadata filtering logic

API_CONTRACT:
Exports:
- AgentLoop: Main agent class for video clip processing
- process_video_clip: Convenience function for processing
- create_initial_prompt: Utility for prompt generation

API_CONTRACT:
Exports:
- ReflectiveAgent: Main class for historical analysis and trend detection
- calculate_visit_frequency: Utility for frequency analysis
- detect_body_condition_trend: Utility for health trend analysis  
- days_since_last_visit: Utility for absence calculation

API_CONTRACT:
Exports:
- CatDatabase: Main database interface class
- dict_factory: SQLite row factory for dictionary results
- serialize_json_field: Utility for JSON serialization
- deserialize_json_field: Utility for JSON deserialization

API_CONTRACT:
Exports:
- Dashboard: Main dashboard class with FastAPI application
- create_dashboard_app: Factory function for dashboard app
- format_timestamp: Utility for timestamp formatting
- calculate_visit_stats: Utility for visit statistics

API_CONTRACT: N/A (this file lists dependencies only)
